agent_output.summary: The release is ready because the new claims audit passed, fragile tests were reviewed, and the automation will reduce manual QA time by 80%. A human approver must sign off before publication.

claims.text: The automation will reduce manual QA time by 80%.
A human approver must sign off before publication.

evidence.snippet: The claims audit suite passed 42 of 42 deterministic checks.

evidence.source: UiPath Test Cloud risk review queue
evidence.snippet: Three fragile tests were reviewed and tagged for repair before the next sprint.
The pilot suggests a 30-40% reduction in manual QA triage time after two weeks.
A human approver must sign off before any external publication or release decision.
